title: XLF, CIFG: Big ETF Inflows
content:
Comparing units outstanding versus one week ago at the coverage universe of ETFs at ETF Channel, the biggest inflow was seen in the State Street Financial Select Sector SPDR ETF, which added 11,450,000 units, or a 1.2% increase week over week. Among the largest underlying components of XLF, in morning trading today Berkshire Hathaway is up about 0.4%, and JP Morgan Chase is lower by about 0.2%. And on a percentage change basis, the ETF with the biggest increase in inflows was the CIFG ETF, which added 10,000 units, for a 40.0% increase in outstanding units. VIDEO: XLF, CIFG: Big ETF Inflows
